name: openasr-catalog
description: Cloudflare Worker that HOSTS the OpenASR signed model catalog (catalog.json + signature) on catalog.openasr.org. Weights stay on Hugging Face.

scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p public && cp ../../model-registry/catalog.public.json public/catalog.json && cp ../../model-registry/catalog.public.signature.json public/catalog.signature.json
